category_title: Students with mild disabilities exhibiting low academic engagement and passive off-task behaviors
minimal_context: The student is participating in a whole-group reading lecture in a general classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class, we are going to start our reading lesson now. Please look at the board while I read the passage to everyone.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits at the desk doing nothing, without making any academic response to the reading task.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Listen carefully as I continue reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns head away from the front and starts looking around the classroom.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to focus on the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues doing nothing related to the reading task, looking around the room and engaging in self-stimulation by repeatedly tapping fingers on the desk.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class, we are going to start our reading lesson now. Please look at the board while I read the passage to everyone.

STUDENT: (Sits at the desk doing nothing, without making any academic response to the reading task.)

TUTOR: Listen carefully as I continue reading.

STUDENT: (Turns head away from the front and starts looking around the classroom.)

TUTOR: Try to focus on the lesson.

STUDENT: (Continues doing nothing related to the reading task, looking around the room and engaging in self-stimulation by repeatedly tapping fingers on the desk.)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: during teacher lecture when teachers are focused predominantly on other students
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: spend almost one fourth of the instruction time by doing nothing, looking around, and self stimulation

behavior_patterns.condition: in no instruction, no activity and no task conditions
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: looking around, no academic response, and no task behaviors
